datapoints.description: Monitor leader elections per second (rate over 5m)
datapoints.name: num_elections

datapoints.description: Monitor store log size in bytes
datapoints.name: store_log_bytes

description: Per-monitor quorum status, leader elections, and store health via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Discovers MONs from ceph_mon_metadata. quorum_status < 1 means monitor lost quorum. Frequent elections (num_elections > 1/sec) indicate instability. Store log growth may indicate compaction issues.
name: ODF_Ceph_Monitor_Health
